node.constraint: Initialize a better-sqlite3 database named 'shop.db'. Create a 'products' table with columns id (INTEGER PRIMARY KEY), name (TEXT), price (REAL), description (TEXT), image (TEXT), category (TEXT), rating (REAL), reviewsCount (INTEGER) if it does not exist. If newly created, seed the database with 10+ realistic Amazon items (e.g., Kindle Paperwhite, Echo Show 8, Fire TV Stick 4K, Apple AirPods Pro, Sony WH-1000XM4, Instant Pot Duo, Ergonomic Office Chair, Yeti Rambler Tumbler, Clean Code Book, Hydro Flask Water Bottle). Support both a GET handler (to return products filtered optional query category/search) and a POST handler to insert new products.

Create a professional products catalog view at app/products/page.tsx (Amazon classic layout: yellow-accented buttons, product grids, sidebar filters by category and rating, search bar). Fetch products from '/api/products' on mount. Display item cards showing: rating stars (e.g. 4.5/5), reviews count, Amazon Prime tag mock, price, strikethrough list price, and a yellow 'Add to Cart' button triggering a POST request to '/api/cart'. Include a global navbar linking to Home ('/'), Cart ('/cart') with badge, and Orders ('/orders').
